docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,500.00 FILED BY THORNTON, JERRY AS TO DEFENDANT NEWREZ LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-18-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT/NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED.(506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $125.00) SERVED OCT-06-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NEWREZ LLC
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO NEWREZ LLC PHONE
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
